title: Thelypteris aquatiloides
taxonomy: Thelypteris aquatiloides is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It belongs to the genus Thelypteris, which is a group of ferns that are native to the Americas. The species is often classified as a member of the order Polypodiales. Thelypteris aquatiloides is further classified as a member of the family Thelypteridaceae, which is a group of ferns that are known for their distinctive leaf shapes and venation patterns. The classification of Thelypteris aquatiloides is also supported by molecular studies, which have confirmed its placement within the family Thelypteridaceae.
